---
name: "refactor: Code Refactor"
about: Propose a code change that improves structure without changing behaviour
title: "refactor: "
labels: refactor
assignees: ""
---

## What are you refactoring?
<!-- Which file(s), module(s), or area of the codebase is this about? -->

## Why does this need a refactor?
<!-- Is the code hard to maintain, too complex, inconsistent, or violating a pattern? -->

## What will change?
<!-- Describe the structural changes you plan to make -->

## What will NOT change?
<!-- Confirm the external behaviour or functionality remains the same -->

## Risks
<!-- Any risk of regression or side effects? How will you verify nothing is broken? -->
